questions.question: Which scientist discovered the structure of DNA (Double Helix)?

questions.question: Bt cotton is a genetically modified crop that produces:
options: Bt toxin (from Bacillus thuringiensis) in the plant — kills bollworm insects that eat the plant; reduces pesticide use
questions.explanation: Bt cotton contains a gene from Bacillus thuringiensis bacteria that produces Cry proteins (Bt toxin) harmful to lepidopteran insects (bollworms). Bt crops have significantly reduced pesticide use in India. Bt cotton was first approved in India in 2002.
